## Problem

What workflow is blocked or awkward today?

## Proposed Change

Describe the smallest change that would help.

## Why It Fits Lithium

Explain how this stays aligned with the app's chat-first, local-first research automation thesis.

## Notes

Add references, screenshots, or similar tools if helpful.
